parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_name, keyword)
  project_name,
  keyword,
  current_position,
  search_volume,
  url_ranking
FROM keyword_rankings
WHERE current_position BETWEEN 5 AND 20
  AND recorded_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY project_name, keyword, recorded_date DESC
LIMIT 20;

INSERT INTO content_gap_analysis (
  project_name, target_keyword, our_url, our_position,
  competitor_urls, topics_missing, questions_missing, entities_missing,
  word_count_gap, priority_score, status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.projectName }}',
  '{{ $json.keyword }}',
  {{ $json.ourUrl ? "'" + $json.ourUrl + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ourPosition || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.competitorUrls) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.topicsMissing) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.questionsMissing) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.entitiesMissing) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.wordCountGap }},
  {{ $json.priorityScore }},
  'pending'
) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
